entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop of African origin cultivated across various ecosystems in Africa

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where sorghum originated and is widely cultivated

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A West African country where sorghum is grown in distinct pure stands

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: A West African country where sorghum is grown in distinct pure stands

entities.name: NORTHERN CAMEROON
entities.description: A region where sorghum is cultivated as varietal mixtures

entities.name: VARIETAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The use of multiple crop varieties to manage agricultural risks and productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The agricultural output that farmers seek to maximize through diversity strategies

entities.name: RISK
entities.description: The potential for crop failure or loss that farmers seek to minimize

entities.name: ADAPTIVE CHALLENGES
entities.description: Complex and diverse environmental pressures influencing crop cultivation

entities.name: ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: The wide and contrasting environmental settings where sorghum is cultivated
